issue_body:
Relay has no rate limiting. Add per-consumer sliding window counter (in-memory). Default 60 req/min per signing pubkey. Configurable via `VEIL_RELAY_RATE_LIMIT`.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 429 with Retry-After when exceeded
- Per consumer pubkey, not per IP
- Sliding window reset
- Tests: under/over limit, window reset

**Effort:** 2-3h | **Points:** RBOB Genesis Bonus (5x)

fisiere_relevante.motiv: numele fisierului se potriveste cu issue: relay.test.ts
